title: Termination, Budgets, Timeouts, and Progress Detection · Failure Case: No Progress
summary: Stop an agent safely under success, failure, budget, and no-progress conditions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops no progress increment in a loop termination and budget policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Detect repeated state, unchanged evidence, and oscillating repairs.
Budget turns, tokens, time, tool calls, money, and external side effects.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
